title: README vault URI example generates double-data path
description: secretx:vault:secret/data/myapp/key in README produces mount=secret, path=data/myapp/key → URL /v1/secret/data/data/myapp/key (double 'data') → 404 for every user who copies the example. Should be secretx:vault:secret/myapp/key (no extra 'data/' before the path). The vault backend prepends 'data/' to the KV v2 path automatically; the URI should not include it.
